title: Squirrel Removal Brighton Beach Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Brighton Beach, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction from attics & walls. Licensed experts serving Brighton Beach. Call for same-day service!
intro: Brighton Beach residents know that squirrels can quickly turn from charming boardwalk visitors to destructive attic invaders. Our professional squirrel removal services protect your Brighton Beach home from these persistent pests that chew through wiring, insulation, and wooden structures. Best Pest Control NYC offers safe, humane squirrel extraction and exclusion services tailored to Brighton Beach's unique mix of high-rise apartments and single-family homes.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Brighton Beach for years, understanding the specific challenges of squirrel infestations in this coastal Brooklyn neighborhood. Our licensed technicians provide rapid response times, humane removal methods, and comprehensive exclusion work to ensure squirrels don't return to your property.
localContext: Brighton Beach's proximity to the beach and parks like Coney Island Creek Park provides abundant habitat for squirrels seeking food and shelter. The neighborhood's mix of pre-war buildings, newer high-rises along Brighton Beach Avenue, and multi-family homes near Ocean Parkway create numerous entry points that squirrels exploit, especially during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Brighton Beach?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Brighton Beach typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. Multi-unit buildings may require additional services. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Brighton Beach homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through roof vents, damaged soffits, gaps around chimneys, and openings where utility lines enter buildings. In Brighton Beach's older buildings, deteriorated wood trim and unscreened attic vents are frequent entry points. They can squeeze through openings as small as 1.5 inches.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my Brighton Beach property?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels pose serious risks including chewing electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaging insulation, contaminating areas with droppings and urine, and creating noise disturbances. They can also carry parasites like fleas and ticks. Prompt removal prevents costly structural damage and health risks.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Brighton Beach home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Brighton Beach for urgent situations. Most squirrel removals are completed within 3-7 days, including trapping, extraction, and initial exclusion work. The timeline depends on the number of squirrels and access points. We provide 24/7 emergency response for Brighton Beach residents.
